title: Cronos Group Q2 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cronos reported Q2 2022 net revenues of $23.1 million, representing 48% year-over-year growth. The company achieved a significant turnaround in gross margins, reaching positive 18% compared to negative 101% in the prior year period. Key balance sheet strength: approximately $945 million in cash and short-term investments, providing substantial flexibility. Management highlighted successful cost-reduction initiatives, targeting $20-$25 million in savings across operating expenses in 2022. The company is transitioning Canadian manufacturing to GrowCo joint venture that achieved profitability. Cronos grew retail dollar sales 69% year-over-year versus the market's 23% growth in Canada. The Spinach brand captured 18.6% market share in gummies with three SOURZ products ranking in Canada's top 10. Revenue surged 212% year-over-year to $7.2 million in Israel, though regulatory headwinds created challenges. The company achieved productivity targets for THCV cannabinoid through Ginkgo Bioworks partnership with product launches expected.
